prompt:
Realistic photo of a young East Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white ribbed knit long-sleeve top, carrying a beige canvas tote bag. She is looking back over her shoulder with a soft smile. Background is a sunny urban park with a white picket fence covered in blooming pink climbing roses, red rose beds, green trees, and a residential building in the distance. Natural daylight, warm spring atmosphere, shallow depth of field.

Soft kawaii-style digital illustration based on a real photo, young East Asian woman with long wavy dark brown hair, wearing a white ribbed knit sweater, carrying a beige canvas tote bag, looking over her shoulder with a gentle smile. Background features a lush pink rose garden with a white picket fence. Scrapbook collage aesthetic with torn paper notes, washi tape, hand-drawn hearts, leaf stickers, flower doodles, and handwritten text reading “Good day, good mood” and “Just a moment to enjoy the little things.” Warm cream background, cottagecore mood, pastel pink and beige tones, watercolor texture.
